name: Plush Blanket with Soft Toy - Bear - Cloud Island™: Polyester Baby Set Includes Animal Themed Blanket & Toy, Solid Design
description:
Envelop your little one in cute, cozy comfort with this Plush Blanket with Soft Toy from cloud island™. Crafted from soft plush material, this baby blanket offers warmth and comfort perfect for snuggling, while its light brown hue effortlessly coordinates with crib sheets, mattresses and nursery decor. It features an adorable teddy bear soft toy, bound to become your baby's beloved companion during naps, stroller rides or car journeys. Plus, this blanket and toy combo makes an excellent gift for baby showers, a baby's first birthday or any other memorable occasion.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
